description: You are a biology teacher at an OLPC-equipped school needing an automated way to generate Punnett squares for complex dihybrid genetic crosses. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/punnett_generator.py that accepts two 4-letter dihybrid parent genotypes as command-line arguments. The script must calculate the 4 possible gametes for each parent and compute the 16 offspring combinations. When combining alleles, the dominant allele must precede the recessive allele for each gene (e.g., Ry + rY = RrYy), maintaining the original gene order. The script must generate a valid HTML file at /home/ga/Documents/punnett_square.html containing a styled table with gametes as headers and offspring genotypes in the cells. Execute the script using the classic round/yellow pea cross (RrYy RrYy).
